prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built EJ207 (2.0L flat-4, closed-deck, forged internals) with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit, billet crank, and Manley I-beam connecting rods for 1,000+ hp capability on E85 fuel. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbo (1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by HKS for optimized exhaust flow.

Full Motec M150 ECU with custom wiring harness by Haltech, integrated with a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone for dual-ECU redundancy. Includes a 4-bar MAP sensor, individual cylinder fuel trims, and launch control tuned for 6,500 RPM flat-shift engagement. Oil and water temperature sensors by Defi Advance BF for real-time monitoring.

Koyoritsu 550cc/min high-impedance injectors with a Tomei fuel rail and dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pumps, feeding a custom 12AN fuel system with -8AN return lines. Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel and a Cusco Type-RS 2.2 LSD for power delivery to the stock R1 Sport AWD drivetrain.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (R1 Sport-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and hood vents. OEM Subaru STI badging replaced with JDM-spec R1 Sport emblems in gold anodized aluminum.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (R1 Sport-specific valving) with 25mm front and 20mm rear adjustable camber plates by Cusco. Front lip spoiler by Voltex (Type 3) and a custom carbon fiber rear wing by Seibon, mounted on a Cusco bolt-on wing riser kit for adjustable angle.

BBS LM-R 18x9.5 +38 front and 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels with 245/40R18 and 275/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Brake system upgrade to Endless CC-R6 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 356mm and 330mm rotors, respectively, paired with Project Mu 999.9 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
